top3.sql:
SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH CustomerConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID
)
SELECT CustomerID, TotalConsumption
FROM CustomerConsumption
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, y.Consumption AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH CustomerConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID
)
SELECT CustomerID, TotalConsumption
FROM CustomerConsumption
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH KAMConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM customers c
    INNER JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID
)
SELECT CustomerID, TotalConsumption
FROM KAMConsumption
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
